purpose: Build or review a performance-sensitive component under the discipline gate.
done_when: gate row has no blank cells
bench claims point to concrete logs
exceptions have evidence

purpose: Sans-IO design work: parser/codec/framing/wire-format, or building dataflow with the proxima-primitives::pipe combinator vocabulary instead of hand-rolled loops or channels.
done_when: state-machine/zero-copy/SIMD/stack/no-Box/O(1) axes are explicitly answered
owned output is separate from hot path or justified
combinator vocabulary is enumerated from proxima-primitives/src/pipe modules and the runnable examples in proxima/examples/ before any dataflow is hand-written

purpose: Move code across crates, explain ownership, or change workspace topology.
done_when: cycle resolution is documented
workspace dependency direction is acyclic
tests or build validate the moved crate

purpose: Prime runtime, executor, inbox, timer, reactor, background-pool, or tokio/prime comparison work.
done_when: every tweak has delta and rollback decision
CoV or host loadout is recorded
E2E impact is checked when component composes downstream

purpose: Answer or validate a performance claim.
done_when: claim cites concrete bench path
score and confidence/noise are not collapsed
target tier is not misrepresented as semantic invariant

purpose: Build or review contained discovery, sealing, or replay for an opaque hardened-runtime child process.
done_when: guiding principles have been reconciled before architecture changes
capture boundary is verified against the real target binary
discovery does not expose ambient secrets by default
seal policy is derived from recorded grants and reviewed exceptions
replay has no implicit host fallback

purpose: Build or review PTY, child-process, or host-resource components proposed from pty-tester.
done_when: existing primitives are audited before a new API is added
public docs point to composed primitives
std/no_std and config/fluent tiers are addressed
validation and failures are recorded

purpose: Build or review a VM-backed working-system projection or dynamically controlled mirror.
done_when: mirror wording composes existing primitives or justifies a new type
guest-visible view and authority transitions are explicit
capture claims are grounded by observed paths
revocation behavior and validation are proven

purpose: Build or review a component in the proxima-protocols::quic / proxima-protocols::http3_codec / proxima-quic / proxima-http::http3 rewrite (any of C1..C41).
done_when: 13-point gate row has no blank cells
sans-IO contract (principle 11) all six clauses DONE
tier-3 promotion status PROMOTED|EXCLUDED|DEFERRED with justification
alloc-budget row updated
perf-targets row updated
home-turf incumbent arm produces a number

purpose: Build or review a component in the proxima-protocols::http3_codec / proxima-http::http3 rewrite (any of C32..C41). Alias of quic-component for H3-specific work.
done_when: 13-point gate row has no blank cells
sans-IO contract (principle 11) all six clauses DONE
tier-3 promotion status documented
alloc-budget + perf-targets rows updated

purpose: Implement or review the proxima-notify initiative (3 substrate components S1-S3 + 10 notify components C1-C10).
done_when: each component row in the component discipline log has no blank cells
home-turf incumbent arms produce numbers
correctness parity against named incumbents documented per principle 14
substrate components S1/S2/S3 land before any component that depends on them

purpose: Build or review PostgreSQL wire protocol support for Proxima without reintroducing upstream pgwire's tokio-bound server API.
done_when: full PostgreSQL protocol capability matrix exists and every deferred row has a named gate
tokio-free native cargo-tree gate is empty
codec allocation budget is measured
startup/simple/extended-query/copy/cancel/auth byte fixtures come from real clients
session FSM and portal store are documented with O(1)/lock-free read evidence
PostgreSQL SSLRequest path composes existing proxima-tls acceptor or explicitly refuses TLS in config

purpose: Extend or consume the PostgreSQL wire stack (codec, session FSM, facade, auth gates).
done_when: capability matrix updated for any new surface
golden parity vs upstream pgwire stays green
psql + tokio-postgres smoke stays green
named gates G1-G8 updated rather than silently expanded

purpose: Build prime / proxima sans-IO surface for wasm32 (browser / wasi). Enablement port, not a perf primitive — no incumbent to bench.
done_when: target compiles
host-ABI extern surface documented
pure logic natively unit-tested
extern-coupled code is wasm32-gated so native stays clean

purpose: Audit where a consumer crate hand-rolls dataflow (manual loops, channels, fan-out, batching, backpressure) that should use a proxima-primitives::pipe combinator instead.
done_when: audit checklist is built from examples/ directory names plus the proxima-primitives/src/pipe module list
consumer crate is grepped for manual loop/channel/fan-out/batch/backpressure patterns before concluding nothing hand-rolled exists
each hand-rolled pattern found is mapped to a specific combinator or explicitly justified as not composable

purpose: Make tokio opt-in behind a `tokio` feature in the proxima umbrella; default build links zero tokio; http2 stays in default via the native h2 serve path. Landed main 764917bc 2026-07-19.
queries: cargo tree -p proxima -e normal --features tokio -i tokio
done_when: default cargo tree -e normal -i tokio is empty
--features tokio restores tokio
default + --features tokio build green
both runtimes green (serve_parity, prime_vs_tokio_h2_native_client, runtime_conformance)
